violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No person was present with Food Safety Manager training. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by rolling racks. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Chicken bites and ham was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The bottom of the prep unit was holding an ambient of 47-49. Chicken bites, and ham in unit was voluntarily disposed of, no remaining food is being stored in bottom of unit. Top of prep unit is holding an ambient of 37. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

The condensate from the temporary air conditioning units is draining into a container and into the hand sink in the kitchen. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024
